world.name: Human Cell

environment.description: Semi-transparent cell interior with organelles, membrane boundary, and cytoplasmic flow

lighting_presets.recipe: warm organelle key + soft bounce fill
warm organelle key + hard rim + practical instrument glow
bright key + lifted shadows for revelation

design_rules: Keep set geometry continuous across scenes
Vary camera and lighting, not the world itself
Every object must sit on a defined surface
